title: Lesson 91: (Grammar) - such things as ...; and ... and; the minute (that)...

intro_cards.title: Particle や: Non-Exhaustive 'And'
intro_cards.body:
や connects nouns like と ('and'), but implies the list is not complete.

• 机の上に本やペンがあります。
(On the desk there are books, pens, and so on.)
• 野菜や果物を買いました。
(I bought vegetables and fruit — among other things.)

と vs や:
• と — exhaustive: lists everything
• や — non-exhaustive: suggests more items exist

やなど (や + など) reinforces the 'and so on' meaning:
• 本やノートなどを買った。(I bought books, notebooks, and so on.)
